query:
SELECT COUNT(*) as total, 
       SUM(CASE WHEN companyId IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as com_company_id,
       SUM(CASE WHEN companyId = 'company_1766331506068' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as baggio_count
FROM properfyProperties;
